account.1. Go to your setting page by clicking o: 1. Go to your setting page by clicking on the below "My Account" button.
account.2. Click \"Modify password...\" button t: 2. Click "Modify password..." button to change your password. Then close the setting page.
account.3. Go back to this page and refresh it b: 3. Go back to this page and refresh it by pressing F5 key. This alert message should be gone.
account.4. If you encounter any issues, please c: 4. If you encounter any issues, please contact your administrator.
account.Profile desc: Manage your personal information and display settings
account.Successfully signed out, redirected to h: Successfully signed out, redirected to homepage
account.The system has detected that you are usi: The system has detected that you are using the default password, which is not secure. You need to modify your password immediately. Here are the instructions

chat.User desc: The user who owns this chat
chat.Your chat text involves sensitive conten: Your chat text involves sensitive content. This chat has been forcibly terminated.

general.Failed to call TTS API, will use default: Failed to call TTS API, will use default browser TTS instead

general.General Settings desc: Basic agent configuration including name, owner and display
general.HTML title - Tooltip: HTML page title displayed in browser tab
general.Hub desc: Discover and chat with public agents
general.Hub description - Tooltip: Custom description shown on the Hub page. Leave empty to use the default.
general.Identity requires Casdoor - Tooltip: The Identity section (Users, Resources, Permissions) requires Casdoor to be installed. Please set up Casdoor first.
general.Is alerted - Tooltip: Whether an alert condition has been raised for this record.
general.Is triggered - Tooltip: Whether the configured trigger or condition has fired.
general.Label: Label
general.Logo URL - Tooltip: URL of the organization logo image
general.Name: ID
general.Navbar HTML - Tooltip: Custom HTML content rendered in the navigation bar.

general.Options desc: Advanced options for agent behavior and integrations
general.Owner - Tooltip: Username or ID of the account that owns this resource.
general.Password - Tooltip: Secret password the user enters to authenticate to the application.
general.Providers desc: AI service providers for model, embedding and capabilities
general.Secret ID - Tooltip: Public identifier of the cloud secret (e.g., access key ID).
general.Skills - Tooltip: Skills that enhance the agent's capabilities by injecting prompt instructions into the system prompt
general.Sorry, the page you visited does not exi: Sorry, the page you visited does not exist.
general.Sorry, you do not have permission to acc: Sorry, you do not have permission to access this page or logged in status invalid.
general.Static base URL - Tooltip: Base URL for static assets such as images and icons
general.Text - Tooltip: Plain-text or rich-text body stored in this field (format depends on the page).
general.Title: Web page title
general.Title - Tooltip: Title for the web page in the browser
general.Token - Tooltip: Authentication token for API access or service integration
general.Tools - Tooltip: Tools available for the agent or MCP server to invoke.
general.Tools desc: Tools exposed by this MCP server
general.Type - Tooltip: Logical type or category code for this field (provider-specific).

message.Author - Tooltip: The actual user or system identity that sent this message.
message.Comment - Tooltip: Optional human-readable note attached to the message.
message.Reply to - Tooltip: The ID of the message to which this message is replied

pipe.App Secret - Tooltip: The Facebook App Secret from the Meta Developer Console, used to verify webhook request signatures.
pipe.Chat ID placeholder: Enter the chat ID or phone number
pipe.Facebook Messenger verify token hint: Set the webhook verify token in Meta Developer Console to your pipe name:
pipe.Facebook Messenger webhook hint: Set the Callback URL in your Facebook App Messenger settings to:
pipe.Phone Number ID - Tooltip: The WhatsApp phone number ID from the Meta Developer Console.
pipe.Weixin Claw scan prompt: Scan the QR code with Weixin and confirm on your phone.
pipe.Weixin Claw status binded_redirect: This Weixin account is already connected.
pipe.Weixin Claw status expired: The QR code has expired. Start again.
pipe.Weixin Claw status verify_code_blocked: Verification was blocked. Start again later.
pipe.Signing Secret - Tooltip: The signing secret from the Slack App Basic Information page, used to verify webhook request signatures.
pipe.Slack webhook hint: Set the Request URL in your Slack App Event Subscriptions to:
pipe.Snapchat App Secret - Tooltip: The App Secret from the Snap Developer Portal, used to verify webhook request signatures.
pipe.Snapchat token hint: Token field = OAuth Access Token obtained from the Snap Developer Portal after creating a bot.
pipe.Snapchat webhook hint: Set the Webhook URL in your Snap Developer Portal bot settings to:
pipe.Threads App Secret - Tooltip: The App Secret from the Meta Developer Console, used to verify X-Hub-Signature-256 webhook signatures.
pipe.Threads token hint: Token field = long-lived User Access Token with threads_basic and threads_manage_replies scopes, obtained from the Meta Developer Console.
pipe.Threads verify token hint: Set the webhook verify token in the Meta Developer Console to your pipe name:
pipe.Threads webhook hint: Set the Callback URL in your Threads webhook settings to:
pipe.WeChat App Secret - Tooltip: The WeChat AppSecret from the WeChat Official Account Platform, used together with AppID to obtain the access token.
pipe.WeChat token hint: Token field = WeChat AppID; App Secret field = WeChat AppSecret.
pipe.WeChat verify token hint: Set the Token in WeChat Official Account Platform server configuration to your pipe name:
pipe.WeChat webhook hint: Set the Server URL in WeChat Official Account Platform server configuration to:
pipe.WhatsApp verify token hint: Set the webhook verify token in Meta Developer Console to your pipe name:
pipe.X Direct Messages Consumer Secret - Tool: The Consumer Secret (API Secret Key) from the X Developer Portal, used to respond to CRC webhook challenges.
pipe.X Direct Messages token hint: Token field = OAuth 2.0 User Access Token with dm.read, dm.write, and tweet.read scopes, obtained from the X Developer Portal.
pipe.X Direct Messages webhook hint: Set the Webhook URL in your X Developer Portal Account Activity API subscription to:

provider.CDN domain - Tooltip: Optional CDN domain used for generating download URLs (e.g. https://cdn.example.com). If set, overrides the OSS endpoint in download URLs.
provider.Category - Tooltip: High-level category of this provider (model, embedding, search, tool, etc.).
provider.Chain - Tooltip: Blockchain network or ledger chain identifier this provider connects to.
provider.Chat test - Tooltip: Try a short chat against the selected model provider to validate connectivity and credentials.
provider.Contract address - Tooltip: Smart contract address on the blockchain network
provider.Contract name - Tooltip: Name identifier for the smart contract
provider.Domain - Tooltip: Hostname or custom domain used for this provider or webhook callbacks.
provider.Enable proxy - Tooltip: Route outbound HTTP/HTTPS requests through the configured HTTP proxy.
provider.Endpoint - Tooltip: Service endpoint URL used to call this provider.
provider.Failed to display speech recognition res: Failed to display speech recognition result
provider.Input type - Tooltip: Input type for embedding (doc vs query)
provider.Is remote - Tooltip: Whether this provider is a remote provider
provider.Model provider - Tooltip: Language model service used when this tool needs chat or completion APIs.
provider.Please select a model provider first: Please select a model provider first
provider.Please select or enter the model name: Please select or enter the model name
provider.Private key - Tooltip: Private key for blockchain transactions and authentication
provider.Public key - Tooltip: Public key used for verification, encryption, or identity checks.
provider.Search engine ID (cx) - Tooltip: Google Programmable Search Engine cx value that scopes custom web search.
provider.Sub type - Tooltip: Provider-specific subtype (e.g., vendor or integration variant).
provider.Thinking tokens - Tooltip: Token count used for reasoning process
provider.Tool function - Tooltip: Function name or schema exposed by the tool for invocation.
provider.Tool test JSON - Tooltip: JSON for one tool invocation: {"tool":"toolName", "arguments":{...}}. The tool field is required.
provider.Tool test JSON must include tool: Tool test JSON must include tool
provider.Webhook - Tooltip: HTTPS URL that receives asynchronous callbacks or events for this integration.

server.Access token - Tooltip: Token used to authenticate requests to this MCP server.
server.Base URL - Tooltip: Base service URL for this MCP server.
server.Sync tools first using the Sync button a: Sync tools first using the Sync button above

setup.Connect a messaging app so users can cha: Connect a messaging app so users can chat with your AI through Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, or Slack. You can skip this step and set it up later.
setup.Get your AI up and running in minutes —: Get your AI up and running in minutes — no technical knowledge required.
setup.Make sure Ollama is running locally befo: Make sure Ollama is running locally before saving
setup.Your configuration has been saved. You c: Your configuration has been saved. You can now start chatting or further customize your setup.
setup.Your secret API key from the provider da: Your secret API key from the provider dashboard

site.Advanced desc: Network, database, and logging settings. Changes to Parent DB Name and Log Config take effect after restart.
site.Authentication desc: OAuth 2.0 / OIDC connection settings. When non-empty these override the values in app.conf.
site.Check user balance - Tooltip: When enabled, the system checks whether the user has sufficient balance before processing each AI request. Disable this for internal deployments where billing is not required.
site.Hub DB names - Tooltip: Comma-separated list of additional database names whose published agents will appear in the Hub (e.g. openagent-db1, openagent-db2). All databases must share the same server endpoint and credentials.
site.IP parsing mode - Tooltip: Method used for parsing client IP addresses (e.g. MaxMind GeoIP2, 17monipdb)
site.Log config - Tooltip: JSON configuration for the logging adapter (e.g. file path, max days)
site.OIDC issuer - Tooltip: The OIDC issuer URL of your identity provider (e.g. https://accounts.google.com). The discovery endpoint /.well-known/openid-configuration is derived from this value.
site.Parent DB name - Tooltip: Name of the parent database for multi-tenant deployments
site.Socks5 proxy - Tooltip: SOCKS5 proxy address (host:port) used for outgoing connections

skill.Content - Tooltip: Markdown body of SKILL.md (after front matter). This text is appended to the agent's system prompt when the skill is active. References are also injected automatically.
skill.Homepage - Tooltip: Official documentation or homepage URL for this skill
skill.No skills found: No skills found in this marketplace
skill.References - Tooltip: Reference files loaded from the references/ directory of the skill folder. Their contents are appended to the system prompt after the main content.
skill.SKILL.md - Tooltip: Full raw SKILL.md source (read-only). Edit Content and References above to change what is injected into the agent.
skill.Search marketplace placeholder: Search skills by name or description…
skill.Skill folder path hint: The folder must contain a SKILL.md file. An optional references/ sub-directory is also read.

store.Disable file uploads for public agents,: Disable file uploads for public agents, or ensure uploaded files are scanned and access-controlled.
store.Enable TTS streaming - Tooltip: Enable real-time streaming TTS (tradeoff latency vs stability)
store.Enable extra options - Tooltip: When enabled, show advanced agent settings such as storage, embedding, agents, and integrations
store.Enable only the tools and skills this ag: Enable only the tools and skills this agent needs, and review MCP server permissions.
store.Example questions - Tooltip: Suggested example questions shown to users in the chat UI.
store.Forbidden words - Tooltip: Words not allowed in chat messages. Messages containing these words will be rejected.
store.Grade - Tooltip: Target grade level for this agent
store.Hide thinking - Tooltip: Hide AI reasoning process from display
store.Image provider - Tooltip: Image storage service provider for media files
store.Keep the co-owner list minimal and remov: Keep the co-owner list minimal and remove owners who no longer need write access.
store.MCP server - Tooltip: MCP server connected to this agent for external tool access.
store.Memory limit - Tooltip: Max context tokens for conversation history
No external API key is configured.

store.No forbidden words are configured, so us: No forbidden words are configured, so user input is not filtered.
store.No forbidden-word violations across {n}: No forbidden-word violations across {n} scanned message(s).
store.No hard-coded secrets found in the agent: No hard-coded secrets found in the agent's prompt or description.
store.No words match the current filter: No words match the current filter
store.Only the primary owner can modify this a: Only the primary owner can modify this agent.
store.Please choose the type of your data: Please choose the type of your data
store.Possible secrets detected in the agent's: Possible secrets detected in the agent's prompt or description: {c}.
store.Prompt - Tooltip: Global prompt template for AI behavior
store.Publish State - Tooltip: Control whether this agent is visible in the public Hub
store.Publishing desc: Control the agent's visibility in the public Hub
store.Remove credentials from the prompt/descr: Remove credentials from the prompt/description and inject them at runtime via a provider or environment variable.
store.Review the flagged messages below and co: Review the flagged messages below and consider blocking or warning the users involved.
store.Review the prompt, files, and knowledge: Review the prompt, files, and knowledge base for sensitive content before publishing.

store.Search provider - Tooltip: Service provider for web search and document search capabilities
store.Set a custom display name (not the defau: Set a custom display name (not the default "New Store" name)
store.Shared by - Tooltip: Login name of the user who originally shared this agent to the current owner.
store.Show auto read - Tooltip: Auto-read AI responses when TTS is enabled
store.Sorry, you are unauthorized to access th: Sorry, you are unauthorized to access this file or folder
store.Split provider - Tooltip: Text splitting strategy for document processing
store.Storage provider - Tooltip: Storage service provider for data persistence
store.Storage subpath - Tooltip: Subpath of the storage location, which can be a single-level or multi-level folder
store.Subject: Subject
store.Subject - Tooltip: Academic subject or domain of this agent
store.The external API key is set and not expo: The external API key is set and not exposed in any readable text field.

This agent is not published publicly.

store.This agent is published and reachable by: This agent is published and reachable by anyone in the public Hub.

store.Topic - Tooltip: Main topic or theme of this agent

store.You cannot fork your own agent: You cannot fork your own agent
